message:
feat(api): add pinverse, kthvalue, linalg_vector_norm, matrix_power, matrix_exp, cholesky_solve; harden index validation

- Implement tensor_linalg_pinv via SVD with threshold-based singular
  value filtering matching torch.linalg.pinv semantics
- Implement tensor_kthvalue returning the k-th smallest element and its
  index, matching torch.kthvalue
- Add linalg_vector_norm, matrix_power, matrix_exp, and cholesky_solve
  implementations (referenced in FEATURE_PARITY)
- Add integer-value validation to bincount, index_add, index_copy, and
  index_fill — reject fractional indices that would silently truncate
- Add Linear Algebra section to FEATURE_PARITY with svd, qr, cholesky,
  cholesky_solve, det, slogdet, inv, pinverse, solve, eigh,
  matrix_power, matrix_exp, linalg_vector_norm
- Add kthvalue to Sorting & Selection section

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -83,7 +83,10 @@ mse_loss, l1_loss, bce_loss, smooth_l1_loss, huber_loss, cross_entropy_loss, nll
 index_select, gather, scatter, scatter_add, masked_fill, index_add, index_copy, index_fill, index_put
 
 ### Sorting & Selection
-sort, topk, argsort
+sort, topk, argsort, kthvalue
+
+### Linear Algebra
+svd, qr, cholesky, cholesky_solve, det, slogdet, inv, pinverse, solve, eigh, matrix_power, matrix_exp, linalg_vector_norm
 
 ### Statistical / Histogram Operations
 bincount (with weights, minlength), histc (with auto-range, clamping)
